customer_anxiety_profile: Kurt is not anxious — he is evaluative. He has done structured research (VA guidance, four prior company visits, competitor designs in hand) and is giving Ion a final look. His cooperative posture is conditional on Ion demonstrating value he has not already seen. The risk is not that he will ghost — it is that he will compare Ion's process unfavorably to the competitor he already prefers and not initiate the callback.
unresolved_concerns: Pricing and cost structure — Kurt asked three times and received scope-holds each time. He has approximate competitor pricing and wants to compare. The closer must be prepared to engage on this directly, not deflect.

Illinois state incentives and VA solar program guidance — Kurt consulted the VA the day of this call and has specific expectations about what the state covers. The closer must know what Ion can and cannot confirm about state incentives.

Ion's design and assessment process vs competitors — Kurt described competitors using drones and satellite scans to produce designs before any in-home visit. He found this process preferable. The closer should be prepared to explain Ion's design methodology and why it produces accurate results.
Bill not yet sent — the callback is contingent on Kurt sending the ComEd bill. If the bill does not arrive, the callback may not happen. Follow-up on bill receipt is the gating action.
sensitive_topics_raised: Veteran status and VA solar research — Kurt is a veteran who used VA resources to evaluate solar companies. This is both a trust signal (he has institutional backing for his research) and a sensitivity (do not contradict or dismiss VA guidance).
28-year electrician background — Kurt has deep electrical knowledge. The closer must not explain basic electrical concepts to him. Engage him as a peer on technical content.

Four prior company visits with a stated competitor preference — Kurt explicitly said he 'pretty much likes the way the other company handled it.' The closer must not ignore this or treat it as a throwaway comment.
exact_promises_rep_made: Randy will send Kurt a text or email (Kurt's choice) with information after the call.
A specialist will be available to go over equipment, local and state incentives, and how the program works.
Kurt can initiate the callback to set a time once he has sent the bill.
closer_should_know: Kurt is a 28-year electrician and veteran who has already received designs from four competitors and has a stated preference for one of them. He is giving Ion a final look. He will not be impressed by basic solar explanations — engage him on technical specifics and on what Ion's design process shows differently for his home. The bill is not yet sent; confirm receipt before the call. Do not use 'I'm just a scheduler' framing or any language that positions Ion as a commodity option.
